frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Yaar, seriously, sometimes I feel like half these modern marriages are just for the 'stability' factor, if you know what I mean. Guys have to be so careful now. One small fight and boom, 498A case. Reverse dowry hi ho gaya hai system pura.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This comment expresses concern that modern women exploit marriage for financial gain ('stability factor') and misuse laws like 498A for 'reverse dowry'. It generalizes about women's intentions and advises men to be cautious, reflecting victimhood inversion and financial suspicion from the 'Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers' frame.
original_frame: The Makeup Paradox: Unnatural Yet Expected
persona_text: You are Arjun. Age 23. Single. A college student in Bengaluru. You are in a WhatsApp group with seven male college friends. Someone has shared a meme that says women spend two hours putting on makeup and then get angry when men call them fake. You are reacting to the meme and adding your own comment about women who wear heavy makeup and what they are hiding and whether men have a right to know what a woman actually looks like before committing to a relationship.
